title: Vault Enhanced Vanilla
description: This is a cool origins and vanilla+ modpack. New enchanting system and new blocks. This modpack also has a server!
body:
Vault Enhanced Vanilla! This modpack is the best of two worlds. The origins world and the vanilla plus world.

This modpack has some cool mods and a discord server you could join. Find new pets like flamingos ducks penguins and more!

Epic dragon fight and when killed drops its scales you can use to upgrade your armor.

Advanced Netherite and Warden Armor, You can get re enforced echoshards and upgrade your netherite armor too make warden gear. You can also upgrade your netherite armor to make iron netherite gold netherite, and diamond netherite. 

3 new structure mods so you can keep exploring. Yung's Better Strongholds, Mineshafts, and Fortresses are on here making the plain vanilla structures look 10x better!

New enchantment system, Most of the vanilla enchantments were replaced with new ones giving abilities. You can walk on water, double jump, dash, and more.

Origins. You can now choose origins which gives you upsides and downsides. Like merling you can breath in water but not on land. Inchling you are tiny and can ride peoeple but only have 5 hearts.
